description: Legal document. Partnership agreement in a press (maʿṣara). In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated: Sunday 4 Tamuz 5275 AM, which is 1515 CE. Currencies: Peraḥim. The four partners are Avraham Talmid, David Alfandre(?), Shelomo Aguilar, and Yosef (de) Sevilla (שביליה, שויליא, די שויליא). Signed by three witnesses (none of whom are the partners), including Meʾir Saragosi. There is a note or addendum on the back.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
